A

ACCEPTED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Entrant.RegistrationRecord.Outcome
Entrant accepted the invitation and is enrolled
acceptInvitation(String) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Entrant
Accepts a lottery invitation for the given event.
addEvent(String) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Organizer
Adds an event to this organizer's list of organized events.
addition_isCorrect() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.ExampleUnitTest
 
addOrganizedEvent(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.OrganizerDB
Adds an event ID to the organizer's organizedEventIds array in Firestore.
addRecipient(String) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Notification
Adds an entrant to the recipient list.
addRegistrationRecord(String, Entrant.RegistrationRecord, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EntrantDB
Adds a registration history record to the entrant's document in Firestore.
addReplacementEntrant(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.LotteryDB
Adds a replacement entrant's device ID to the selectedEntrantIds array in Firestore after a re-draw.
addToConfirmedAttendees(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EventDB
Atomically adds a given device ID to an event's confirmed attendees list in Firestore.
addToWaitingList(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EntrantDB
Adds an event ID to the entrant's waitingListIds array in Firestore.
addToWaitingList(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EventDB
Adds a deviceId to the event's waitingListIds array in Firestore.
Admin - Class in com.example.cmput301_app.model
Represents an administrator in the application.
Admin() - Constructor for class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Admin
Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase deserialization.
Admin(String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Admin
Constructs an Admin with all required fields.
AdminDB - Class in com.example.cmput301_app.database
Handles all Firestore database operations for Admin actions.
